core.companyPitch: Live butterfly releases are unpredictable, ethically questionable, and often fail to deliver the desired visual effect. Flutter Sync replaces them with precision-controlled mechanical butterflies that guarantee a flawless, cinematic experience every time.
core.companyRevenue: One-time service fee per event (tiered luxury pricing: $1,500–$5,000+). Optional upsells: custom choreography, branding, video capture packages
core.companyAdvantage: A hybrid of drone micro-tech + theatrical choreography + luxury event design. Combined with pre-programmed flight patterns and operator control, Flutter Sync guarantees “perfect moments”—something nature can’t deliver.
core.companyInventory: Full-time job (stable income) ~10–15 hours/week nights & weekends Family support structure (married, 2 kids) Laptop + internet Estimated startup budget: $3k–$8k Early-stage prototyping capability (consumer drone/toy tech adaptation)
